title: Fancy Sand | Wavy Dunes
description: Updates Sand and its related blocks with a warmer, wavier look!
body:
![Project Title: "Fancy Sand - Wavy Dunes"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6240c180b19c13f4113bda3967e087a3678fa126.png)
---
[![ko-fi](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg&n=-1)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)

**Fancy Sand** is a small Resource Pack that replaces the texture of **Sand, Red Sand and their derivate blocks**, updating their looks to appear much wavier, softer and more in line with the current **Vanilla style**. 

Also, the two main blocks of this Resource Pack (Sand and Red Sand) have received a completely new look that creates **small dunes and waves** to make them fit their biomes more!
Red Sand and Red Sandstone have a completely **new palette**, while Sand and Sandstone have an **updated version of the old one**.

![Isometric render of the updated blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7c69d0bbf20f4fcc77fcbf94789ff37f898895a.png)
Specifically, here is a list of all the blocks that have been updated:
- **Sand** and **Red Sand** blocks.
- **Sandstone** and its **Cut and Chiseled variants**.
- **Red Sandstone** and its **Cut and Chiseled variants**.
---
The Resource Pack is fully compatible with **MC 1.9-1.21.8**, with **support planned** for any future versions!

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
